notes: v386 — 🪤 Add a trailing stop to shares you already own. Every holding now has a 🪤 Trail button right next to 🎯 Target and 🛑 Stop: tap it, type a % (or leave blank to remove), and that share gets a trailing stop that rises with the price and never falls. Choose it per holding — only the ones you want. (It was already tucked in the ⋯ menu; now it's a one-tap button on every holding.) Practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
